query:
UPDATE users 
SET email = 'empresa@example.com', 
    name = 'Empresa Demo',
    password = '$2b$10$VAd7Xy16S8LKTDtf/yFJvO3MQJXftM.i.MrJiGN0E5XA0ImLkiuj6'
WHERE email = 'admin@sisa.com';

INSERT INTO users (email, name, password, role, tenantId, loginMethod, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 'profissional@example.com', 'Profissional Demo', '$2b$10$XIyUaU69t4.XxCvYYzvk7On22RrJReS/2yclkA4frLk6QPqKTEmUy', 'professional', 1, 'password', NOW(), NOW()
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE email = 'profissional@example.com');

UPDATE users 
SET name = 'Wilson Bernardes',
    password = '$2b$10$XqJiBG1wrb5J.fgIv.7x3urs7x5jUQpo2MZJ8.XJ7kMwiRvbC5.xW'
WHERE email = 'willsonbs@gmail.com';
